title: FAA Turns to AI for Runway Safety

source.title: How the FAA is using AI for runway issues

segments.title: AI Tool Rollout
segments.audioText: The FAA says it will roll out a new AI-powered tool designed to predict problems before they cause delays.
segments.transcript: The FAA says it will roll out a new AI-powered tool designed to predict problems before they cause delays.
segments.translationZh: FAA 話會推出一個由 AI 驅動嘅新工具，用嚟喺問題造成延誤之前作出預測。

points.label: The FAA says
points.explanationZh: The FAA 係美國聯邦航空管理局；says 後面通常接官方公布內容。

points.label: roll out
points.explanationZh: roll out 即推出、開始使用；科技同政策新聞好常見。

points.label: before they cause delays
points.explanationZh: before 提前講時間關係；delays 係航班或流程延誤。

segments.title: Efficiency Goal
segments.audioText: Officials say the technology could make flying more efficient and reduce cancellations.
segments.transcript: Officials say the technology could make flying more efficient and reduce cancellations.
segments.translationZh: 官員話呢項技術可能令飛行更有效率，並減少航班取消。

points.label: Officials say
points.explanationZh: officials 指官員或相關部門人士；新聞常用嚟交代消息來源。

points.label: could make flying more efficient
points.explanationZh: could 表示可能性；more efficient 即更有效率。

points.label: reduce cancellations
points.explanationZh: reduce 係減少；cancellations 係取消，航空新聞入面通常指航班取消。

segments.title: Human Error
segments.audioText: Those really are almost always because of human error.
segments.transcript: Those really are almost always because of human error.
segments.translationZh: 嗰啲情況其實幾乎一直都係因為人為錯誤造成。

points.label: Those really are
points.explanationZh: Those 指前面提到嘅問題或事故；really 加強語氣。

points.label: almost always
points.explanationZh: almost always 即幾乎總是；聽到 almost 要留意唔係百分百。

points.label: because of human error
points.explanationZh: because of 後面接名詞短語；human error 即人為錯誤。

segments.title: Possible Prevention
segments.audioText: So it's possible that this new AI could help prevent those altogether.
segments.transcript: So it's possible that this new AI could help prevent those altogether.
segments.translationZh: 所以呢個新 AI 有可能幫手完全避免嗰啲情況。

points.label: So it's possible that
points.explanationZh: So 用嚟承接前文；it's possible that 表示『有可能……』。

points.label: could help prevent
points.explanationZh: could help prevent 即可能有助防止；語氣比 will prevent 保守。

points.label: those altogether
points.explanationZh: altogether 係完全、整體上；句尾補充防止嘅程度。

sentences: The FAA says it will roll out a new AI-powered tool designed to predict problems before they cause delays.
Officials say the technology could make flying more efficient and reduce cancellations.
Those really are almost always because of human error.
So it's possible that this new AI could help prevent those altogether.

vocabulary.example: The company will roll out the new app next month.
vocabulary.translationZh: 公司下個月會推出新 app。

vocabulary.example: The airport is testing an AI-powered system.
vocabulary.translationZh: 機場正測試一套 AI 驅動嘅系統。
呢個工具可以預測延誤。

vocabulary.example: There was a short delay at the gate.
Online check-in makes travel more efficient.
vocabulary.translationZh: 網上辦理登機令旅程更有效率。
好好計劃可以避免問題。

phrases.example: The tool is designed to predict problems early.
Staff want to fix issues before they cause delays.
Better scheduling can make flying more efficient.
The mistake happened because of human error.

phrases.meaningZh: 幫手完全避免嗰啲情況
phrases.example: New alerts may help prevent those altogether.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:05 跟讀 The FAA says it will roll out...，先分成 The FAA says / it will roll out / a new AI-powered tool。
重播 00:15，先聽寫 could make flying more efficient，再補 reduce cancellations。
用 designed to... 練替換：designed to save time / designed to reduce delays / designed to spot problems。
用兩句英文複述：The FAA is rolling out an AI-powered tool. It could help reduce flight delays.

notes: 今日片段係 Good Morning America / ABC News 約 1 分 22 秒嘅科技同航空新聞，主題係 FAA 用 AI 減少跑道問題同航班延誤。
聽力重點係科技新聞常見動詞：roll out、predict、reduce、prevent。
時間碼 00:05、00:15、00:42、00:49 可以逐句重播；先盲聽關鍵動詞，再看稿拆 chunk。
dailyLifePractice 會延伸到機場問延誤、改行程同工作上簡短解釋科技工具。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking About a Flight Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺機場見到航班延誤，想禮貌問職員最新情況。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, do you have any update on the delay? Is the gate still the same? Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, do you have any update on the delay?
lines.zh: 你好，請問延誤有冇最新消息？

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.en: We're still waiting for an update from operations.
lines.zh: 我哋仲等緊營運部門嘅最新消息。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Is the gate still the same?
lines.zh: 登機閘口仲係同一個嗎？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Do you have any update on...? 好自然又有禮貌，適合問航班、預約、維修進度。keep an eye on the board 即『留意顯示屏』，係機場好實用嘅講法。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 the delay 換成 my connection、boarding 或 the gate change。
drills.example: Do you have any update on boarding?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Is the gate still the same? 三次，語氣保持友善。
drills.example: Is the gate still the same?

dailyLifePractice.title: Changing Plans Smoothly
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：航班或交通有延誤，你想同朋友快速改見面安排。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick heads-up: my flight is delayed. I may get in a little later than planned. Could we meet closer to seven?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick heads-up: my flight is delayed.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: No problem. How late are we talking?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I may get in a little later than planned.
lines.zh: 我可能會比原定遲少少到。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Could we meet closer to seven?
lines.zh: 我哋可唔可以接近七點先見？

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick heads-up 係美式口語入面好常用，意思係『先通知你一聲』。closer to seven 唔係一定七點正，而係接近七點，語氣柔和。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Could we meet closer to...? 改一個時間。
drills.example: Could we meet closer to eight?

drills.label: Short response practice
drills.prompt: 對方問 How late are we talking? 用一句英文答。

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a New Tool at Work
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：公司開始用新工具，你要用簡短自然英文同同事解釋用途。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: We're rolling out a new tool this week. It's designed to catch small issues earlier. Hopefully, it saves everyone some time.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: We're rolling out a new tool this week.
lines.zh: 我哋今個星期會推出一個新工具。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: What is it supposed to do?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: It's designed to catch small issues earlier.
lines.zh: 佢設計用嚟更早發現細問題。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hopefully, it saves everyone some time.
lines.zh: 希望可以幫大家慳返啲時間。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: What is it supposed to do? 係好自然嘅澄清問題，比 What does it do? 多少少『預期用途』嘅意思。Hopefully 放句首，語氣輕鬆唔誇張。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 catch small issues earlier 換成 reduce mistakes、speed up check-in 或 organize requests。

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 Hopefully, it... 講一個你希望新工具做到嘅效果。
drills.example: Hopefully, it makes the process easier.
